items.summary: Fix the PressKitPage so that the page is fully scrollable and a scrollbar is visible/accessible. Ensure the root container and any parent elements on the /press-kit route do not have overflow:hidden, overflow:clip, or any other CSS that suppresses scrolling. The page body and root container must allow vertical scroll so users can reach all sections (logo, video, about, game details, features, screenshots, download button, socials, press email).
